This New Gadget Puts An Entire Toolbox In The Palm Of Your Hand

GET YOUR DISCOUNT NOW

Sponsored by Kelvin Tools

Over $1.2 Million ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Sold & Counting!

"I cannot believe how often I use this tool and wonder how I got along without it!... the perfect kitchen drawer multitool."

This new gadget is an amazing gift for any dad - take it from me, a dad myself, let me show you why...

As a lifelong handyman, I’ve seen my fair share of “multi-tools”.

Some are excellent lifelong tools… but most are gimmicky garbage. They’re either completely worthless (none of the “functionalities” work), or they fall apart after a few weeks of mild use. Bah.

So, when my friend gifted me a new multi-tool called Kelvin17 that claims to “put an entire toolbox in the palm of your hand”, I was naturally skeptical…

However, my friend insisted it could handle all of my daily tasks in a pinch. He said he picked up a couple to test out after discovering them on Facebook. First, he was going to give one to his son, but after trying it, he thought someone like me would appreciate it even more…

So I dropped it in my job site tool bag - mostly to please my buddy. (It’s the same reason I’ll be wearing an ugly lime green sweater this Christmas, and NOT ironically… you’re welcome, mom.)

But after a few weeks of using it, I have to admit: He was right.

The Kelvin17 doesn’t just look cool – it’s a very well-made everyday tool.

I’m not easy to impress, either… but I’ve been shocked by how useful it is. Not only is it made with high-quality materials, I use at least one of the 17 built-in tools every day – and all of them perform extremely well. So don’t be fooled by its compact size!

Kelvin17 includes pretty much all of the essential tools I use on a daily basis. It's very useful when you're in a pinch – it’s sort of like having your toolbelt with you wherever you go. Let me explain...

What is it?

Kelvin17 is a compact multi-tool that includes 17 functionalities:

  • Carbon steel hammer
  • Liquid level
  • LED flashlight
  • 3 ft flexible tape measure
  • Flip-action screwdriver with 90º locking
  • 12 Extra hardened alloy driver bits
  • 4 (3 Extra) Philips head bits
    • 3 Flathead bits
    • 3 Allen key bits
    • 3 Torx bits

All packaged in its own ingenious carry case

No question: This is the most useful multi-tool I’ve ever tried.

Kelvin17 is made from a mix of steel alloy and military-grade ABS plastics, so it’s the perfect mix of lightweight and durable. After all, what’s the point of tools that can’t take a beating, am I right?

Unlike cheap gimmicks, I’m not ashamed to bust out my Kelvin17 in a pinch – and I’ve even received compliments from my contractor buddies!

Most importantly, all the tools function the same as (or better than) the “real deal”. Don’t get fooled by the clever design – the Kelvin17 holds its own even during tough projects.

How Does it Work?

Let’s get into the details here, shall we? I’ll start with the functionalities I use most.

First off, the flip-action screwdriver is my favorite part – it really surprised me. Just press a button and BOOM! The drive swings out and locks into place. It’s like the switchblade of multi-tools!

The 12 extra bits all nest neatly inside the handle, which means you’ll always have the perfect screwdriver for the job!

No more wasting time rummaging through the tool bag.

No other tool has been able to combine so many essential tools into such a functional design… it’s genius!

A built-in magnet holds on all alloy bits, both on the end of the screwdriver and inside the case, so you never have to worry about losing your bits.

To be honest, I didn’t expect to be able to get much torque with it, but the 90-degree drive option actually gives me way more leverage than a standard screwdriver, making it ideal for breaking loose the most stubborn screws. It’s also great for getting into those really tight spaces without busting up your knuckles.

Next, the built-in LED light comes in extremely handy.

I’m constantly working in dark areas like in closets, under sinks, and even under houses. Now I simply press the button and it lights up the tip of the screwdriver so I can see what I’m doing. No more trying to hold a flashlight with one hand while struggling to work with the other.

I was shocked at how much I used the measuring tape.

I now realize that most of the measurements I make on a day-to-day basis are only a few feet. My standard 25’ tape is actually bigger and heavier than the entire Kelvin tool and only does one thing! Now that I have my Kelvin17 I haven't touched my conventional measuring tape in weeks.

The carbon steel hammering surface is perfect for quickly pounding in nails and “persuading” things back into place like stubborn paint can lids and those wooden dowels you use when putting together flat-pack furniture.

For me, it’s just instinctual to quickly knock something into place using whatever tool I have in my hand at the time. With the Kelvin17 it’s nice to know it’s actually designed to do that (and it works like a charm).

When mounting TVs (a job I do at least twice a week) having the built-in level is a total game-changer (or should I say teeth saver!).

Before owning the Kelvin17 hanging a TV meant juggling between 3 different tools (screwdriver, measuring tape and level). I would always end up holding my nasty screwdriver in my mouth to free up a spare hand while switching tools.

Now I have everything I need in one tool, no more juggling! To be honest… I never want to mount another TV without my Kelvin17.

Who is Kelvin17 Ideal For?

As you can imagine, contractors and handymen are going to love Kelvin17… but that’s just the beginning.

Anyone that needs a go-to tool that covers all their household needs is going to love this - and DIYers, college students, practically anyone (both men and women honestly) are already raving about it.

Honestly, I think anyone will get plenty of use out of it. It’s a great utility tool to keep in your kitchen drawer, toolbox or glove compartment.

To me, the most important proof comes from the thousands of others who use it too… and since writing this, the Kelvin17 has sold over $1.2 Million of these in just 1 year. Clearly, I’m not alone!

What Else I Love About Kelvin17

  • You Always Have The Right Tool – Forget messy toolboxes filled with tools you never use! Kelvin17 combines every tool you'll ever need into one, saving you tons of frustration, time and effort. Just grab it, use it and go.
  • It's a $150 Value At a Fraction Of The Cost – Buying all your tools separately could cost you over $150 at your local hardware store! Save hundreds on extra tools and multiple trips to the store by getting all the 'must-have' DIY essentials in one device.
  • It's There When You Need It Most – Kelvin17 is the most compact urban multi-use tool ever made – the size and weight of your cell phone – so it easily fits in your pocket, car glove box, or kitchen drawer. It's always within reach even when space is tight!
  • It's So Easy Anyone Can Use It – Kelvin17’s practical ergonomic design makes the job easier – you don’t need to be a contractor or handyman to use it. Now anyone from the kids to grandma can take care of little fixes around the house!
  • It Makes a Perfect Gift – Kelvin17 is an amazing present for almost anyone in your life! A great gift for days such as Father’s Day, Mother’s Day, birthdays, holidays, housewarming parties, and even college dorm move-in day.
  • Their 30 Day Money Back Guarantee – If for any reason you're not 100% satisfied with your Kelvin17, you can easily return it, hassle-free!

As Seen In

Kelvin17 is starting to make a name for itself, which is no surprise! People are raving about it! (In fact, Kelvin17 has HUNDREDS OF 5-STAR REVIEWS ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐)

People don’t just love Kelvin17 because it works, but because it is super easy to use too!

It’s so easy and inexpensive, there’s really no reason not to order your Kelvin17 right now! This is especially true since there’s ABSOLUTELY NO RISK to give the Kelvin17 a try. What I love about this company is that they stand behind their product! Don’t love it? Send it back for a full refund. (But you won’t want to!)

Join the THOUSANDS of people who are enjoying the speed, convenience, and versatility of Kelvin17!
